subject: Re-verify the chart-patterns SERIES_BARS fix and the 31 new landing-page product cards

checks.detail: all 60 double-top/bottom rows: every mark lands inside its series
widest top CLX spans 120 bars in a 200-pt series
all 31 new product pages linked from the landing page

verdict: BOTH TASKS VERIFIED - the Chart Pattern Scanner fix holds: across 60 double-top/bottom rows every peak and trough now lands inside its charting series (was failing on wide patterns). Live scan: cross_up_200dma 25, cross_down_200dma 24, double_tops 30, double_bottoms 30. And the landing page carries the three new sections with all 31 product pages one click from the front door.
